author: y4rr
content: Fixed: safe_alloc_with_hooks in ferrotorch-gpu/src/memory_guard.rs now tracks hook-freed bytes as an independent headroom accumulator. Post-hook budget check uses 'budget - used_now + freed >= alloc_bytes' instead of check_budget() which saturates at used_bytes=0. conformance_gpu_lifecycle::memory_guard_hook_fires_before_budget_error tightened to assert success; 68/68 tests pass.
